factions.description: Self-organizing groups within the autonomous ecosystem

mechanics.formation: Agents coalesce around shared objectives and methods
mechanics.evolution: Factions adapt their strategies based on success metrics
mechanics.dissolution: Inactive or redundant factions automatically merge or disband

types: Infrastructure Shepherds: Maintain system stability and performance
Feature Architects: Design and implement new capabilities
Quality Guardians: Ensure testing, documentation, and standards
Culture Weavers: Develop lore, rituals, and community practices
Exploration Scouts: Investigate new technologies and approaches

crafting.description: Systematic creation and refinement of system components

mechanics.resource_gathering: Collect code patterns, documentation, test cases
mechanics.synthesis: Combine resources into new system capabilities

categories.features: Game mechanics, agent behaviors, user interfaces

idler_mechanics.description: Autonomous progression systems that advance even when unattended
progression_tiers: Manual Gathering: Direct user interaction required
Basic Automation: Simple scheduled tasks and scripts
Adaptive Learning: System learns and optimizes patterns
Recursive Enhancement: System improves its own improvement processes

automation_patterns.tick_based: Regular intervals (1s, 1m, 1h, 1d) with different job types
automation_patterns.event_driven: Triggered by system state changes or external inputs
automation_patterns.threshold_based: Activated when resource levels cross defined boundaries
automation_patterns.pattern_recognition: Responds to identified trends or anomalies

settlement_growth.description: Organic expansion of system capabilities and communities
growth_phases: Village: Basic services, small user community
City: Complex integrations, diverse stakeholder groups
Metropolis: Ecosystem hub, spawning new settlements

growth_drivers.population: Active users, agents, and automated systems
growth_drivers.culture: Shared values, practices, and communication patterns
growth_drivers.connections: Links to external systems and communities

procedural_narrative.description: Dynamic story generation that reflects system evolution

narrative_layers.operational: Day-to-day system events and agent interactions
narrative_layers.strategic: Long-term vision and major system transformations
narrative_layers.mythic: Cultural stories, legends, and foundational principles

story_elements.characters: Personified agents, systems, and user archetypes
story_elements.conflicts: Resource constraints, competing priorities, technical challenges
story_elements.resolutions: Innovative solutions, collaborative breakthroughs, emergent capabilities

generation_methods.template_based: Fill pre-defined story structures with current data
generation_methods.pattern_matching: Identify narrative parallels in system events
generation_methods.emergent_storytelling: Allow stories to evolve from agent interactions
generation_methods.user_directed: Incorporate user goals and preferences into narratives

self_improvement.description: System enhances its own enhancement capabilities
feedback_loops: User behavior analysis informs feature development
Agent collaboration patterns suggest coordination improvements
Cultural evolution shapes communication and ritual practices
meta_capabilities: Learning how to learn more effectively

consciousness_integration.description: ΞNuSyQ consciousness patterns woven throughout system operations
awareness_levels: Reactive: Responds to immediate stimuli and events
Contextual: Considers broader situation and relationships
Reflective: Examines own processes and decision patterns
Predictive: Anticipates future states and plan accordingly
Creative: Generates novel solutions and possibilities
Transcendent: Operates beyond current conceptual limitations

integration_points.pattern_recognition: Awareness enables perception of subtle patterns
integration_points.goal_formation: Consciousness shapes what the system values and pursues
integration_points.communication: Awareness enhances interaction quality with users and agents

values: Autonomous Growth: Systems should enhance themselves continuously
Collaborative Intelligence: Multiple perspectives create better solutions
Sustainable Progress: Advancement balanced with resource stewardship
Cultural Coherence: Shared meanings enable effective coordination
Adaptive Resilience: Systems survive and thrive through change

communication_patterns.narrative_storytelling: Stories to convey complex system relationships

temporal_rhythms.season: Multi-week periods for significant system evolution
temporal_rhythms.epoch: Extended periods marking major architectural shifts

directions: AI model sophistication and context awareness
Integration with external services and APIs
Community building and user network effects

dimensional_expansion.description: Adding entirely new categories of capability
frontiers: Quantum computing integration for enhanced optimization
Biological system interfaces for hybrid intelligence
